name: _APInit@0
notes: clear the airport registry (0x27-max 0x134-byte AIRPORT records at _airports) and the carrier-deck occupancy table (0x58e870)

name: @APAdd@4
notes: register (or update by object id +0xe6) an AIRPORT record; up to 0x28 airports

name: @APDelete@4
notes: remove an AIRPORT by object id, compacting the registry

name: _APNearest@20
notes: nearest airport to a point, filtered by side (friendly-only), landable class flag +9 bit 0x8000, optional same-side / landing-type-valid tests; retries dropping the alive requirement
type: undefined4 __stdcall APNearest(undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4)

name: @APTakeoffType@8
notes: classify a plane+airport into a takeoff state: 10 vertical (VTOL), 7 catapult, 0xd carrier-deck taxi, 0x11 runway takeoff — from the plane class bits +0xba and the airport capability bytes +0xe8..+0xec (consumed by PlayerUpdateState, #492)

name: @APLandingType@8
notes: landing-state twin of APTakeoffType: 0x18 vertical/carrier, 0x16 arrested, 0x17 runway

name: APOnCatapult
notes: is the player on the catapult spot (on ground, within 0x7d00 of the airport catapult point)

name: _APStripFree@0
notes: is the runway clear of other taxiing/taking-off planes controlled by the same airport (traffic sequencing); calls each plane's class proc(8)

name: APStripFreeBody
notes: overlapping alternate entry of APStripFree (bounded plane-list scan)

name: @APFind@4
notes: look up an AIRPORT record by object id

name: _APClearParks@0
notes: clear all parking-spot assignments across every airport and reset parked planes to state 0x1f

name: _APGetPark@0
notes: the parking-spot index _curId currently holds at its home airport, or -1

name: _APAssignPark@0
notes: assign _curId the first free parking spot at its airport (unassigning any it held elsewhere first)

name: _APUnassignPark@0
notes: release every parking spot held by _curId across all airports

name: _APApproachPath@20
notes: compute the glideslope steering to the home airport: cross-track + vertical offsets rotated into the runway heading, plus a range-scaled throttle/gear cue
type: undefined4 __stdcall APApproachPath(undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4, undefined4)

name: APApproachPathBody
notes: overlapping alternate entry of APApproachPath

name: _APTeleport
notes: free-flight teleport of the player to the nearest airport: 0 = on the runway, 1 = short final w/ hook, 2 = 10k airborne, 3 = 40k airborne (FMInitPlane each)

name: ?APSetOffset@@YGXPAUOBJ@@PAUAIRPORT@@PAUOBJ_ON_CARRIER@@@Z
notes: record a plane's position relative to a carrier deck (rotated offset + heading delta) into an OBJ_ON_CARRIER slot so it rides the moving ship

name: @APAddToCarrier@4
notes: add _curId to the carrier-deck occupancy table with its relative offset

name: @APRemoveFromCarrier@0
notes: remove _curId from the carrier-deck table

name: @APCheckCarrier@0
notes: per-frame: if the player is parked on a carrier deck attach it (so it rides the ship), else detach; ServicePlayer calls this (#492)

name: APOnDeck
notes: is a point within a carrier's bounding box and above the deck (a downward Collision probe of class 4)

name: _APHomeAirport@0
notes: pick the player's home/destination airport — the last waypoint if a flight plan exists, else the nearest landable friendly field

name: @APObjOnShip@4
notes: if object N is riding a carrier deck, return that carrier's object id
